name: ASO World
description: ASO World — mobile app and game promotion platform for keyword installs, review and rating optimization across Apple App Store, Google Play, Galaxy Store and RuStore.

seo.title: ASO World — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: ASO World: ASO World — mobile app and game promotion platform for keyword installs, review and rating optimization across Apple App Store, Google Play, Galaxy S

when_to_use: Boosting keyword rankings via incentivized installs on App Store and Google Play
Review and rating management campaigns for improving store credibility
Keyword install campaigns for Samsung Galaxy Store and RuStore
Accelerating early-stage app visibility through organic rank boosting

pros: Covers App Store, Google Play, Galaxy, RuStore
Alternative stores support is rare in the space
cons: Not a clean analytics/ASO intelligence suite
review.verdict: Growth marketplace more than ASO platform; tread carefully given store policy risks.
review.best_for: Publishers on Galaxy Store or RuStore needing localized installs
review.not_for: Brands that can't risk Apple or Google policy pushback
